title: Strider's Grace
description: Adds a boots enchantment that allows the player to move fast through lava
body:
Swimming in lava can feel quite slow, this mod aims to change that by adding a simple enchantment that allows the user to move/swim faster in lava.

Strider's Grace can be obtained as a rare enchantment through the enchanting table and has three levels, each of them providing a scaling speed increase.
